title: Living in Winghaven, O'Fallon, MO
content:
Winghaven is a live-work-play community within O'Fallon, MO. Named after its history as a chicken farm for Monsanto.

DEVELOPMENT: MasterCard established its operations center near I-64/40, catalyzing growth throughout St. Charles County.

LOCATION: Centered around Winghaven Boulevard (becomes Bryan Road), bordered by Post Road (west) and Bates Road (east).

KEY AMENITIES:
- Winghaven Country Club: golf memberships, social memberships, swimming pool, event space, dining. Golf cart community.
- Boardwalk Marketplace (near Phoenix Parkway): Shortleaf Brewing, learning center, salon, library, travel agency, playground, community garden
- Wetlands area with miles of walking trails and public art sculptures by local artists
- Multiple parks and playgrounds
